evals.description: Trigger test: activates on MonoBehaviour scripting question
evals.prompt: I'm building a player controller in Unity and need to move a character using Rigidbody. Should I put the movement code in Update or FixedUpdate?

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on shader programming question
evals.prompt: I need to write a custom unlit shader for URP that supports a base color tint and a texture. What's the basic structure?

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on UI Toolkit question
evals.prompt: How do I create a health bar UI in Unity using UI Toolkit with UXML and USS?

evals.description: Core task: writing a proper MonoBehaviour with cached references
evals.prompt: Write a Unity C# script for an enemy that chases the player. It should cache component references properly and use the correct lifecycle methods.

evals.description: Core task: setting up an ECS system with DOTS
evals.prompt: I want to use Unity ECS to move 50,000 entities forward every frame. Show me how to define the component and system.

evals.description: Core task: creating a ScriptableObject data container
evals.prompt: I need a way to define weapon stats (damage, fire rate, projectile prefab) as reusable assets in Unity. What pattern should I use?

evals.description: Core task: configuring physics raycasting with layers
evals.prompt: How do I implement a click-to-interact system in Unity that raycasts from the camera and only detects objects on specific layers?

evals.description: Core task: building a ListView with UI Toolkit
evals.prompt: I have a list of 500 inventory items and need to display them in a scrollable UI using Unity UI Toolkit. How do I set up a virtualized ListView?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about GetComponent in Update loop
evals.prompt: My Unity game runs fine with 10 enemies but drops to 15fps with 200. Each enemy script calls GetComponent<Rigidbody>() in Update to apply movement. What's wrong?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about moving Rigidbody with Transform
evals.prompt: I'm moving my player character by setting transform.position directly each frame, but it keeps clipping through walls even though both have colliders. What am I doing wrong?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about SRP Batcher compatibility in shaders
evals.prompt: I wrote a custom URP shader but the Frame Debugger shows it's not SRP Batcher compatible. Each object with my material is a separate draw call. How do I fix this?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not recommend using SendMessage for communication
evals.prompt: What's the best way to send events between GameObjects in Unity - like when an enemy dies and the score manager needs to update?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not recommend mixing 2D and 3D physics
evals.prompt: Can I use a Rigidbody2D with a BoxCollider (3D) on the same GameObject in Unity to get both 2D movement and 3D collision?

evals.description: References load: points to ECS reference file for advanced DOTS questions
evals.prompt: I need to implement a complex ECS baking pipeline in Unity to convert my authored GameObjects to entities in subscenes. How does the Baker system work with structural changes and ECBs?
